LanguageData.FCP_Floor_BunkerRoundGrills.description: Heavy-duty metal flooring with round ventilation grills, commonly found in pre-war military bunkers. Durable and easy to clean.
LanguageData.FCP_Floor_BunkerRoundGrills.label: bunker floor (round grills)
LanguageData.FCP_Floor_BunkerStraightGrills.descripti: Heavy-duty metal flooring with straight ventilation grills, commonly found in pre-war military bunkers. Durable and easy to clean.
LanguageData.FCP_Floor_BunkerStraightGrills.label: bunker floor (straight grills)
